blended.narrative: Bristol Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,783 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
